prose:
**Fukui reactivity (nitrobenzene)** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier `standard`, exact RKS integrals), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied nitrobenzene.xyz, single-point Fukui calculation (no geometry relaxation). Software: PySCF via chemkit’s `fukui-reactivity` (version as bundled in chemkit engine). SCF converged cleanly for the neutral, cationic (doublet), and anionic (doublet) states. No engine `warnings` reported.

Most electrophilic site: carbon atom 4 (1-based indexing; atom index 3 in the input file) with Fukui f⁺ = 0.49641781
Most nucleophilic site: carbon atom 5 (1-based indexing; atom index 4 in the input file) with Fukui f⁻ = 0.10728820

Reproducibility:
• Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp24jwohhj/live.json
```
• Full JSON output: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp24jwohhj/live.json`
• Live log: `<cwd>/fukui_<timestamp>.out` (streaming SCF and diagnostic details)
